fields.label: Ollama Host
fields.description: URL where the Ollama server is running

fields.label: Default Model
fields.description: Model loaded from your Ollama server (pull models with ollama pull <name>)

fields.label: Thinking Indicator
fields.description: Border effect shown while Ollama is generating a response

fields.label: System Instructions
fields.description: System prompt instructions to guide the model's behavior

fields.label: Temperature
fields.description: Output randomness control (lower is more focused and deterministic)
